## Checklist

### For new tool additions:
- [ ] Tool is not already in the list
- [ ] URL links to the official homepage
- [ ] Description is one factual sentence (no superlatives or marketing language)
- [ ] Pricing is accurate (verified today)
- [ ] Tool is actively maintained (updated within the last 12 months)
- [ ] Placed in the correct and most relevant category
- [ ] Follows the exact table format used in the section

### For all PRs:
- [ ] PR title follows the format: `Add [Tool] to [Category]` or `Fix [description]`
- [ ] I have read [CONTRIBUTING.md](../CONTRIBUTING.md)
- [ ] I have no undisclosed financial relationship with any tool I'm adding

**Affiliation disclosure (if applicable):**
<!-- If you built this tool or work for the company, say so here. We welcome it, but transparency is required. -->
